description_long: This object is a classic, long-barreled rifle with a wooden stock and fore-end, likely modeled after a historical or hunting firearm. The stock is made of polished wood, featuring a smooth, slightly curved butt and a straight comb, providing a traditional appearance. The barrel is long and slender, constructed from dark metal, and extends well beyond the wooden fore-end, suggesting accuracy over distance. The rifle includes a visible trigger guard, hammer, and iron sights, with the action mechanism and ramrod also apparent. The finish of the wood is matte with a subtle sheen, while the metal components have a darker, semi-gloss finish. This rifle would be found in urban settings such as historical displays, private collections, or as a prop in themed environments.
description: A long, traditional rifle with a polished wooden stock and a dark metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a classic design. The rifle has a smooth wooden finish and a slender, extended barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view down the barrel, emphasizing the narrow profile and alignment of the sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the trigger, hammer, and the full wooden stock with the metal barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and action.
